title: stenocarpus forsteri
intro: Stenocarpus forsteri, also known as the red ironbark or Moreton Bay fig, is a large, deciduous tree native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Stenocarpus forsteri are typically made from the bark and leaves, which can be infused in hot water to create a tea or used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine practices.
